title: Chicken Kebab Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken kebab curry dish from Indian cuisine. Serve with rice or naan for a filling meal.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine ginger paste, garlic paste, red chili powder, onion powder, kebab spice blend, and 1 tablespoon of yogurt. Blend until smooth.
Add the blended spice mixture to a large bowl. Add the chicken and mix until coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off.
Grill the chicken for 6-8 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of yogurt and stir to combine.
Add the lime juice and stir to combine.
Add the cooked chicken to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Serve the chicken hot with rice or naan.
